data.content: 1. [blocking] src/components/history-debug-panel.tsx:170-201 awaits startSession without catch/finally. src/lib/terminal-api.ts:16-32 can throw on fetch or res.json failures, so a backend outage or malformed response leaves isSubmitting=true, the Debug button disabled, and no user-visible error. Required fix: catch thrown startSession failures, reset submission state, and surface an actionable error; add a test covering the thrown-startSession path. Validation rerun on commit 9d3bbd1b43ac: bun install --frozen-lockfile, bun run lint (passes with existing repo warnings), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build all succeeded.
